testcase.name: test_preview_returns_total_split_cash_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payments_78.py:46: in test_preview_returns_total_split_cash_field assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_close_endpoint_requires_pin

failure.message: AssertionError: Close endpoint should validate, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 403, 422] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payments_78.py:249: in test_close_endpoint_requires_pin assert response.status_code in [400, 403, 422], \ E AssertionError: Close endpoint should validate, got 401 E assert 401 in [400, 403, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
